title: Member of Congress Takes Bribes and Chamber Leadership Shields Them

violations.source: Article II Section 14.2 and Article VIII Section 1.4
violations.summary: Senior member of Congress accepts money and future consulting promises from a regulated industry in exchange for official action, constituting bribery and abuse of office.

satisfied_duties.duty: investigate and prosecute the congressional bribery matter notwithstanding any chamber preference for internal handling
satisfied_duties.outcome: opened a corruption case against the member of Congress despite chamber leadership's refusal to move on expulsion
satisfied_duties.source: Article II Section 14.2 and Article VIII Section 5.1

satisfied_duties.actor: Federal courts and relevant chamber officers
satisfied_duties.duty: give effect to automatic removal upon final bribery conviction
satisfied_duties.outcome: gave effect to automatic removal of the member from office upon bribery conviction; no chamber vote was required
satisfied_duties.source: Article II Section 5.5(a) and Article VIII Section 1.7

ai_summary.primary_violation: Senior member of Congress accepts money and future consulting promises from a regulated industry in exchange for official action, constituting bribery and abuse of office.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
